title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
summary: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
summary: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

title: Storms Prompt Evacuations at Washington’s July 4 Festivities
summary: Thunderstorms are set to batter July 4 celebrations in Washington, DC, and New York as a waning heat dome continues to test electricity grids in the eastern US, following record power demand over the past few days.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 07/04/2026
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier
summary: Andy Konwinski used Anthropic's Fable 5 debacle as exhibit A in the case against letting a handful of private labs govern who gets to do AI research.

title: Bitcoin ETFs log record eighth straight negative week despite large Thursday inflow
summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.

title: Nearly 1 million wallets are down $3.81 billion on Trump’s memecoin: report
summary: Trump's annual financial disclosure showed a $636 million payout tied to the token and more than $1.4 billion in total crypto-related income for 2025.

title: My fellow American: who should be remembered for the next 250 years?
summary: Artists, thinkers and leaders from the US and beyond pick the person they think deserves to be honoured, from Abraham Lincoln to Dorothy Parker

title: Francis Fukuyama: The problem of equality
summary: We must understand our identity to be fundamentally rooted in a set of ideas, not the racial or ethnic identity of our ancestors
